requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — ACMA Framework / AS/NZS CISPR and AS/NZS 61000 Series
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——ACMA框架 / AS/NZS CISPR及AS/NZS 61000系列
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——ACMA框架 / AS/NZS CISPR及AS/NZS 61000系列

summary.en: EV charging equipment supplied in Australia must comply with the electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) framework administered by the Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) under the Radiocommunications Act 1992 and the Telecommunications Act 1997. EV supply equipment is subject to state Electrical Safety Regulations (e.g. 2013) for electrical safety and the ACMA Radiocommunications (Electromagnetic Compatibility) Standard 2017 for EMC. The applicable technical standards for EMC of EV charging equipment include AS/NZS CISPR 11 (emissions from industrial, scientific and medical equipment) and/or AS/NZS CISPR 32, and immunity standards from the AS/NZS 61000 series (IEC 61000-4 series). Compliance with EMC requirements is a prerequisite for the RCM mark, which covers electrical safety, EMC, and telecommunications compliance.
summary.zh: 在澳大利亚销售的电动汽车充电设备须符合澳大利亚通信和媒体管理局（ACMA）依据《无线电通信法1992》和《电信法1997》管理的电磁兼容（EMC）框架。电动汽车供电设备的电气安全须遵守州级电气安全法规（例如2013年法规），EMC须遵守ACMA《无线电通信（电磁兼容）标准2017》。电动汽车充电设备EMC的适用技术标准包括AS/NZS CISPR 11（工业、科学和医疗设备发射）和/或AS/NZS CISPR 32，以及AS/NZS 61000系列（IEC 61000-4系列）抗扰度标准。符合EMC要求是获得RCM标志的前提条件，RCM标志涵盖电气安全、EMC及电信合规。
summary.zht: 在澳大利亞銷售的電動汽車充電設備須符合澳大利亞通信和媒體管理局（ACMA）依據《無線電通信法1992》和《電信法1997》管理的電磁相容（EMC）框架。電動汽車供電設備的電氣安全須遵守州級電氣安全法規（例如2013年法規），EMC須遵守ACMA《無線電通信（電磁相容）標準2017》。電動汽車充電設備EMC的適用技術標準包括AS/NZS CISPR 11（工業、科學和醫療設備發射）和/或AS/NZS CISPR 32，以及AS/NZS 61000系列（IEC 61000-4系列）抗擾度標準。符合EMC要求是獲得RCM標誌的前提條件，RCM標誌涵蓋電氣安全、EMC及電信合規。

standards_or_laws: Radiocommunications Act 1992 (Cth) — ACMA EMC framework basis
AS CISPR 11:2017+A1:2020 — Industrial, scientific and medical equipment — Radio-frequency disturbance characteristics (emissions)
AS/NZS 61000.6.2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic standards — Immunity for industrial environments
AS/NZS 61000.6.4 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic standards — Emission standard for industrial environments

summary.en: China's EMC framework for EV charging equipment is administered by the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) and the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (MIIT). Relevant Chinese EMC standards include GB/T 18487.1-2015 (which incorporates EMC requirements for EV charging systems) and GB 17799 series (equivalent to IEC 61000-6 generic standards). The Chinese CCC certification scope (CNCA-C25-01:2024) covers EMC testing for EV charging equipment. Chinese CNAS-accredited EMC test reports to GB standards are generally not accepted as equivalents under the Australian ACMA framework.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备的EMC框架由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）和工业和信息化部（MIIT）管理。相关中国EMC标准包括GB/T 18487.1-2015（涵盖电动汽车充电系统的EMC要求）和GB 17799系列（等同IEC 61000-6通用标准）。CCC认证范围（CNCA-C25-01:2024）涵盖电动汽车充电设备的EMC测试。依据GB标准获得的中国CNAS认可EMC测试报告通常不被澳大利亚ACMA框架接受。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備的EMC框架由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）和工業和信息化部（MIIT）管理。相關中國EMC標準包括GB/T 18487.1-2015（涵蓋電動汽車充電系統的EMC要求）和GB 17799系列（等同IEC 61000-6通用標準）。CCC認證範圍（CNCA-C25-01:2024）涵蓋電動汽車充電設備的EMC測試。依據GB標準獲得的中國CNAS認可EMC測試報告通常不被澳大利亞ACMA框架接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2015 — includes EMC requirements for EV conductive charging systems (SAMR/SAC)
GB 17799 series — Electromagnetic compatibility — Generic standards (MIIT/SAMR, equivalent to IEC 61000-6 series)

gap.en: EMC certification gap: EV charging equipment must be tested and assessed to Australian/ACMA EMC standards (AS/NZS CISPR and AS/NZS 61000 series). Chinese GB-standard EMC test reports do not satisfy ACMA requirements. The supplier must prepare an EMC compliance declaration referencing the applicable Australian technical standard(s) and supported by test reports from an NATA-accredited (National Association of Testing Authorities) or ILAC MRA-member laboratory. EMC compliance is a prerequisite for the RCM mark. EV chargers (particularly DC fast chargers with high-frequency switching converters) present significant conducted and radiated emission challenges that require specific attention in Australian test conditions.
gap.zh: EMC认证差距：电动汽车充电设备须按照澳大利亚/ACMA EMC标准（AS/NZS CISPR和AS/NZS 61000系列）进行测试和评估。中国GB标准的EMC检测报告不满足ACMA要求。供应商须准备引用适用澳大利亚技术标准的EMC合规声明，并以NATA认可（澳大利亚检测机构国家协会）或ILAC MRA成员实验室出具的检测报告为支撑。EMC合规是获得RCM标志的前提条件。电动汽车充电设备（尤其是使用高频开关转换器的直流快充）在传导和辐射发射方面存在重大挑战，在澳大利亚测试条件下需特别关注。
gap.zht: EMC認證差距：電動汽車充電設備須按照澳大利亞/ACMA EMC標準（AS/NZS CISPR和AS/NZS 61000系列）進行測試和評估。中國GB標準的EMC檢測報告不滿足ACMA要求。供應商須準備引用適用澳大利亞技術標準的EMC合規聲明，並以NATA認可（澳大利亞檢測機構國家協會）或ILAC MRA成員實驗室出具的檢測報告為支撐。EMC合規是獲得RCM標誌的前提條件。電動汽車充電設備（尤其是使用高頻開關轉換器的直流快充）在傳導和輻射發射方面存在重大挑戰，在澳大利亞測試條件下需特別關注。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance required under ACMA framework; prerequisite for RCM mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC requirements included in CCC scope (CNCA-C25-01:2024); GB 17799 / GB/T 18487.1 EMC requirements apply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance under the ACMA framework is mandatory and a prerequisite for the RCM mark. Australian EMC standards (AS/NZS CISPR, AS/NZS 61000 series) must be used; Chinese GB-standard EMC reports are not accepted. Test reports must come from a NATA-accredited or ILAC MRA-member laboratory. DC fast chargers face particular EMC challenges due to high-frequency switching converters and require careful attention during Australian EMC testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ACMA框架下的EMC合规为强制要求，且是获得RCM标志的前提条件。须使用澳大利亚EMC标准（AS/NZS CISPR、AS/NZS 61000系列）；中国GB标准EMC报告不被接受。检测报告须由NATA认可或ILAC MRA成员实验室出具。直流快充设备因高频开关转换器存在特殊EMC挑战，在澳大利亚EMC测试中需特别关注。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ACMA框架下的EMC合規為強制要求，且是獲得RCM標誌的前提條件。須使用澳大利亞EMC標準（AS/NZS CISPR、AS/NZS 61000系列）；中國GB標準EMC報告不被接受。檢測報告須由NATA認可或ILAC MRA成員實驗室出具。直流快充設備因高頻開關轉換器存在特殊EMC挑戰，在澳大利亞EMC測試中需特別關注。
